OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Frank Paratore is present.
Attorney William Gilg appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Larry Ketcherside is present.
Attorney Timothy J. Kodani representing the defendant through limited scope.

Judge Wallace Douglas, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 624, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

The trial date of JAN-23-2012 is vacated.
